name: Stewed Celery with Herbs
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces cream cheese, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized skillet, heat the celery, parsley, and 1 inch of water to boiling over high heat.
2. Reduce the heat to low, cover, and cook the celery until tender, about 10 minutes. Uncover and continue cooking, stirring constantly until all liquid evaporates, about 15-20 minutes. Transfer the mixture to a medium bowl.
3. In the same skillet, melt the butter over medium heat. Stir in the flour until smooth.
4. Gradually stir in the milk and cook, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens.
5. Stir in the cream cheese, basil, chives, and salt. Cook until the cheese melts.
6. Return the celery to the sauce; heat the mixture just to boiling and serve immediately.
Notes: If using fresh herbs (which is preferable), use 1 tablespoon for each 1 teaspoon required of the dry herbs.
